season_rule: For season Y, ratings use only completed games from seasons strictly < Y. 2022 is all-NULL (no pre-2022 data in repo).

excluded_fields.reason: Not rebuildable from game_table.parquet; approved inputs do not include strikeout-rate data

fields.name: season
fields.description: Target season for which this rating applies

fields.name: umpire_id
fields.description: MLB Stats API umpire numeric ID

fields.name: prior_season_umpire_over_rate
fields.description: runs_factor from prior seasons; NULL if has_prior_rating=False

fields.name: prior_season_games
fields.description: Prior-season game count (0 if umpire not in prior seasons)

fields.name: prior_seasons_used
fields.description: Comma-separated seasons contributing; empty string for 2022

fields.name: league_avg_total_prior
fields.description: League mean actual_total from prior seasons; NULL for 2022

fields.name: umpire_avg_total_prior
fields.description: Umpire mean actual_total from prior seasons; NULL if not in prior pool or 2022

fields.name: has_prior_rating
fields.description: True iff prior_season_umpire_over_rate is a valid number

carry_forward_notes: 2022 all-NULL — models should use neutral value (1.000) or drop umpire feature for that season
2023 coverage 36.2% — thin but PIT-safe; consider additional regularization
League baselines differ by season and are not poolable across years
This layer is distinct from the 2026-frozen forward-use umpire repair layer
umpire_k_rate excluded — not rebuildable from approved inputs
Clamp [0.900, 1.100] applied; 31 rows hit boundary, mostly early thin-sample seasons
Unicode normalization resolves diacritic variants (e.g., Alfonso Marquez)
